spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the document-source speculation rules injecting real type='speculationrules' nodes dynamically based on user selections.

interactive.rationale: Features select dropdowns for eagerness level and action type (prefetch vs prerender) that rebuild and inject rules on the fly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly aligns with the mobile viewport intersection and touchstart adjustments.

edge_cases.rationale: Uses feature-detection flags to report browser support and binds mouseover/touchstart inputs correctly.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful design with proper status updates, clean box-shadows, and great legible fonts.

openQuestions.title: Verify speculation rules status via Performance API
openQuestions.detail: Rather than mocking the speculation outcome via event listeners, using `performance.getEntriesByType('navigation')[0].activationStart` or similar APIs on actual navigation could confirm if a prerender was successful. For an in-page simulator, a link to Chrome's DevTools Speculative Loads panel guide would be excellent.

summary: A superb interactive speculation rules injector that generates authentic JSON script objects dynamically and prints robust log feedbacks, fully meeting design guidelines.
